_comment: POST this to the admin API: /apis/smolvm.extensions.cloud-apim.com/v1/smol-machines (or create it from the back-office 'SmolVM Machines' page). A pool of `instances` node:22-alpine micro-VMs is created lazily on first request and reused; idle ones are reaped after `idle_timeout`.
name: node runtime
description: A pool of live node:22-alpine machines exposing the node RPC protocol
